title: Ur-Sema Du

'''Ur-Sema Du''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
[[File:Ursemadu.jpg|thumb|left|Ur-Sema Du and [[Kai Justiss]] fight a [[marsh haunt]].]]
Ur-Sema Du was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] after constructing a green-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

When the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] erupted into a [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|conflict]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], Master Du answered [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] call-to-arms by flying to the dust-covered world. As part of Windu's [[Jedi assault team/Legends|strike team]] assembled to rescue Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from execution by the Confederacy leaders, Du landed on the plains of Geonosis outside the [[Petranaki arena]]. While her comrades attacked the arena from the grandstands, Master Du delved deep into the [[Geonosian catacombs/Legends|catacombs]]. Amidst the damp quiet of the insect-constructed facility, she was the first Jedi to encounter the monstrous [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], a [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] who was poised to lead the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] in the coming [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Wielding her lightsaber against Grievous' [[Electrostaff/Legends|electrostaff]], Du fought valiantly but was overpowered and killed by the General. Collecting her lightsaber as a trophy, Grievous left her body where it laid, his existence remaining a secret from the Republic until he was ready to unleash his full might on the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="US" />

==Behind the scenes==
This Jedi was the creation of artist [[Joe Corroney]], who modeled her after fellow artist [[Jan Duursema]], from whom the character also takes her name. The name originally appeared only on Corroney's website, and was thus not part of the [[canon]]. This changed after the mention in ''[[Unknown Soldier: The Story of General Grievous]]'', which made the name canonical.<ref name="blog">{{Blog|abelgpena|55|Endnotes for The Story of General Grievous, Part 2: The Knight Slayer}}</ref>

Corroney and Chung would later expand upon the known canonical details of Kai Justiss' life in Corroney's blog, "Drawing in the Empire." The expansions were inspired by Justiss' existing depictions and included identifying Ur-Sema Du as Justiss' master. As this detail have not been published in a canonical source, however, it is not canon.<ref name="blog justiss">{{Blog|joecorroney|18|The Story of Kai Justiss}}</ref>
